scripts.version:patch: npm version patch --no-git-tag-version && git add package.json && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
scripts.version:minor: npm version minor --no-git-tag-version && git add package.json && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
scripts.version:major: npm version major --no-git-tag-version && git add package.json && git commit -m "chore: bump version to $(node -p "require('./package.json').version")" && git tag v$(node -p "require('./package.json').version")
